title: Iterating Through an Array of Student Grades

content.problemStatement:
In this example, we will demonstrate how to use a `for` loop to iterate over an array of student grades and print each grade along with the student number.

---

**Expected Output:**

```default
Student 1 grade: 85
Student 2 grade: 92
Student 3 grade: 78
Student 4 grade: 88
Student 5 grade: 95
```
